# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: envoy.dataplane.google.com/v2alpha1
kind: EnvoyConfiguration
metadata:
  name: my-service-mesh
spec:
  common:
    transport_sockets:
      envoy.transport_socket.tcp:
        typed_configs:
          "# Type: tcp::1"
          - match:
            listener_address: ":1"
            transport_socket: tcp
            name: envoy.listener_filterchain
            filtered_streams:
              filters:
                - name: envoy.router
                  typed_config:
                    "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
                    routers:
                      - name: local_service
                        routes:
                          - match:
                              prefix: "/"
                            route:
                              cluster: my-backend
                  config_snapshot: latest
                - name: envoy.cluster.type.retry_and_timeout_budget
                  typed_config:
                    "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.retry_and_timeout_budget.v3.RetryAndTimeoutBudget
                    retry_policy:
                      max_retries: 5
                      initial_interval: 0ms
                      backoff_factor: 2.0
                      circuit_breaker_config:
                        enabled: true
                        error_threshold: 10
                    timeout_budget:
                      max_pending_requests: 100
                      max_request_duration: 5s
                      connection_pool_limits:
                        max_connections_per_endpoint: 100

  clusters:
    - name: my-backend
      connect_timeout: 5s
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: my-backend
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
            - endpoint:
                address:
                  socket_address:
                    address: backend-service-ip
                    port_value: backend-service-port
